title: Extra Inventory Patch
description: Graphical patch for the mod Extra Inventory. Dark UI available.
body:
Resource pack for **Extra Inventory**: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extra-inventory](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extra-inventory)

Connecting the additional inventory slots better into the main inventory.

**Dark UI** version based on Vanilla Tweaks Dark UI (c)

More information about the transparent version: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/transparent-inventory-window](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/transparent-inventory-window)
